## What & why

Describe the change and the motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run format:check`, `npm run typecheck`, and
      `npm test` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for changed behavior
- [ ] Relevant `docs/` updated if an architectural contract or user-visible
      behavior changed
- [ ] If `src/shared/*` changed: called out explicitly below with rationale

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs extra attention (platform-specific paths, lifecycle
edge cases, etc.).
